candidate_check.description: Open/save of Excel 95 workbooks must be blocked.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Excel 2016 >> Excel Options >> Security >> Trust Center >> File Block Settings >> Excel 95 workbooks is set to "Open/Save blocked, use open policy".

Use the Windows Registry Editor to navigate to the following key:

HKCU\software\policies\microsoft\office\16.0\excel\security\fileblock

If the value for xl95workbooks is REG_DWORD = 2, this is not a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Set policy value for User Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Microsoft Excel 2016 >> Excel Options >> Security >> Trust Center >> File Block Settings >> Excel 95 workbooks to "Open/Save blocked, use open policy".
title: Open/save of Excel 95 workbooks must be blocked.
